scripts.vercel-build: pnpm run apply:runtime && pnpm run build
scripts.apply:runtime: pnpm run apply:last9 && pnpm run apply:creator-music && pnpm run apply:formulas && pnpm run apply:ecosystem && pnpm run apply:brand && pnpm run apply:db-query-contract && pnpm run apply:paid-launch && pnpm run apply:organization-setup && pnpm run apply:payload-size-guard && pnpm run apply:cohesive-ui && pnpm run apply:builder-ui
scripts.db:push: pnpm run db:patch-triggers && pnpm exec supabase db push
scripts.db:push:all: pnpm run db:patch-triggers && pnpm exec supabase db push --include-all
scripts.lint: eslint server.js api routes lib scripts tests public --ignore-pattern "frontend/**" --ignore-pattern "my-app/**" --ignore-pattern "sonara-industries/**" --ignore-pattern "**/node_modules/**" --ignore-pattern "**/.next/**"
scripts.verify:launch: pnpm run apply:runtime && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run scan:client-secrets && pnpm run lint && pnpm run smoke:routes && pnpm run verify:db && pnpm run verify:config && pnpm run verify:api
scripts.workers:smoke: echo No background workers configured for Express MVP
